🐾 🐾 🐾 🐾

Tux & Taz’s First Day Outside

A brave tale of one puffy chin and one cozy bush

Written by Norman Dorans

🐾 🐾
Tux and Taz had spent their whole lives being carried around the house. From the kitchen to the sofa to the sunny windowsill, gentle hands always lifted them up and set them down safely. But today was different. Today, they were going outside for the very first time.
1
🐾 🐾
The garden was huge and full of strange new things. Tux saw something buzzing in the air and decided to be very brave. He pounced! But the angry wasp had other ideas, and suddenly Tux's chin was as puffy as a marshmallow.
2
🐾 🐾
Taz wasn't so brave. When he heard the buzzing, his eyes grew wide and he darted for safety. He found the perfect hiding spot under a cozy bush where all the scary things couldn't reach him. From there, he could watch Tux's adventure.
3
🐾 🐾
Tux soon found Taz's hiding spot. With his puffy chin, he squeezed in beside his friend. Together under the bush, the outside didn't seem so scary anymore. They watched the clouds drift by and decided that maybe, just maybe, adventures are better when you share them.
4
